query:
=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[Assistant] **Phase 1 Interim Results:**

```
RETROSPECTIVE BRIEFING for bugfix-383
========================================
Session stats: 1 session, 837 records, 400 tool calls, 109m

HOTSPOTS (9 total — 5 warning, 4 info):
- [warning] context_load: 232 KB loaded before first write (testing phase)
- [warning] compile_cycles: 52 compile/check cycles (testing phase — tester running full suite repeatedly)
- [warning] tool_failure_hotspot: Read failed 10x, mcp__context_search failed 5x (testing phase)
- [warning] file_breadth: 26 distinct files accessed (discovery phase)
- [warning] mutation_spread: 18 files mutated (discovery phase)
- [info] reread_rate: 23 files re-read multiple times
- [info] output_parsing_struggle: cargo test piped through 3 filters
- [info] search_via_bash: 8.4% bash calls are searches
- [info] sleep_workarounds: 4 sleep workarounds (testing phase)

WHAT WENT WELL (baseline improvements):
- permission_friction_events: 0.0 vs mean 17.7 — zero orphaned calls
- coordinator_respawn_count: 0.0 vs mean 1.4
- post_completion_work_pct: 0.0 vs mean 5.4

REWORK SIGNALS:
- Gate failure 1: SKILL.md files not in blast radius search, missing investigator report
- Gate pass 2: Both issues resolved

RECOMMENDATIONS FROM RETROSPECTIVE:
- Use run_in_background + TaskOutput instead of sleep polling
- Batch field additions before compiling
```

**Phase 1b — Stewardship Quality Review:**
- **#3485** (pattern): "Renaming a detection rule requires updating 5+ string-keyed match arms across two crates" — stored by rust-dev. Relevant and specific. ✓
- **#3487** (lesson): "Bugfix renames must include all SKILL.md files referencing the renamed identifier" — stored during gate failure. Direct, actionable. ✓
- **#3446** (lesson): "PermissionRetriesRule measures tool failures..." — **stale**: references a rule that no longer exists (renamed to OrphanedCallsRule). Needs correction.

2 good entries, 1 needs updating. Spawning architect for Phase 2.
[tool: mcp__unimatrix__context_get(bugfix-383-retro) → ]
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: 186 Compile Cycles in dsn-001: Use cargo test -p, Not Full Workspace, Per Change
Large file compile-cycle amplification: search.rs at 4000+ lines produces 94 compile cycles when adding a new pipeline step
